title: carduus defloratus var. carlinifolius
intro: Carduus defloratus var. carlinifolius is a variety of the wild cardoon, a type of flowering plant native to Europe, known for its thistle-like appearance and medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Carduus defloratus var. carlinifolius include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
